info.title: AquaSense API
info.description: Backend API for the AquaSense IoT monitoring system.

post.description: Register with email and password. Default role is 'user'.
Exchange email + password for a JWT session.
Invalidate the current session server-side and clear cookies.

patch.description: Update channel_id, ts_api_key, phone, or full_name.

get.description: Retrieve the single latest sensor reading for the authenticated user.
Retrieve aggregated readings history for the user based on range ('24h', '7d', '30d').
Establish a Server-Sent Events stream for real-time telemetry updates.
Retrieve alerts for the authenticated user, optionally filtered by status.

post.description: Acknowledge an active water warning alert.
Mark an alert as resolved when telemetry returns to normal.
Mark a notification alert as read.

get.description: Retrieve high-level statistics: user activity, total readings, average WQI, alert frequency, and trends.
Retrieve users with search, role filters, sorting, and pagination.
Fetch a user profile by ID.

delete.description: Revoke all user sessions and delete user account. Cascadings delete associated telemetry data.

patch.description: Promote or demote a user role. Syncs public database representation with auth app_metadata.

get.summary: Read telemetry history across all users

get.description: Retrieve paginated alerts list with optional severity and state filters.

get.summary: Monitor ML pipeline across all users
get.description: Retrieve paginated ML results and risk score logs.
Health check endpoint to verify backend status.

AdminAlertResponse.title: AdminAlertResponse
AdminAlertResponse.description: Water quality alert with user context.

AdminReadingResponse.title: AdminReadingResponse
AdminReadingResponse.description: Telemetry reading with optional user metadata.

AdminStatsResponse.title: AdminStatsResponse
AdminStatsResponse.description: High-level system metrics and trends compiled for administrators.

AlertFrequencyStats.title: AlertFrequencyStats
AlertFrequencyStats.description: Stats tracking alerts over recent timeframes.

AuthResponse.title: AuthResponse
AuthResponse.description: Wraps UserResponse for signup/login — cookies carry tokens.

MLDistributionStats.title: MLDistributionStats
MLDistributionStats.description: Aggregated prediction levels and anomaly occurrences.

PaginatedReadingsResponse.title: PaginatedReadingsResponse
PaginatedReadingsResponse.description: Paginated list of global telemetry readings.

ProfileUpdateRequest.title: ProfileUpdateRequest
ProfileUpdateRequest.description:
PATCH /api/auth/profile body.

All fields are optional — only provided fields are updated.

SystemStatusStats.title: SystemStatusStats
SystemStatusStats.description: Connection and service heartbeat health states.

TrendDataPoint.title: TrendDataPoint
TrendDataPoint.description: Daily time bucket data for trends.

UserResponse.title: UserResponse
UserResponse.description: Standard user representation returned by auth endpoints.
